data.body: ROOT CAUSE (sharpened): the attach-to-origin/tickets capability already existed and works with no TTY (init_core→_mount_or_create_branch); the bug was that auto-init's consent gate fail-closed — _create_tracker only auto-allowed the worktree-symlink case, so a normal fresh clone fell into _confirm_and_init's TTY check and died. FIX (branch worktree-civil-marlin-flare, commit 8001a571): added pending_init_attaches_to_existing (local or origin tickets branch) and take the auto path for it — mounting existing shared state, no new orphan store. A genuine first-time init still requires consent (guarded by a regression test). Pending PR/merge before close.
